learnings: For this repo, README acceptance is best validated by aligning wording directly with the tested CLI behavior: strict trimmed move inputs `1`-`9`, play-again inputs `y/yes/n/no`, and the exact scoreboard field order `X wins`, `O wins`, `Draws`.
result_payload.summary: Added a minimal root `README.md` documenting the Clojure terminal human-vs-human tic-tac-toe app, `make run`, `make check`, gameplay rules, strict move-input and play-again input behavior, the in-memory session scoreboard order, and explicit non-features. Manually verified the Markdown, ran `make check`, spot-checked `make run`, and the Ralph validator passed.
